code:
import io

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line().ok_or("missing input")?
  let n = string.parse_int(string.trim(line)).ok_or("invalid input")?
  mut i = 1
  while i <= n
    let m3 = i % 3 == 0
    let m5 = i % 5 == 0
    if m3 and m5
      println("FizzBuzz")
    else if m3
      println("Fizz")
    else if m5
      println("Buzz")
    else
      println("#{i}")
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end

import string
